chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-5176 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge ________________________________________________________ 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of Misc. No.23748/2023 3. For hearing of main case 09.09.2025 Mr. Sajid Ali Channar advocate for petitioner Ms. Wajiha Mehdi Asstt. Attorney General M/s. Muhammad Haroon Kasi Director (Law), Abdullah Hanjrah Deputy Director (Law), Muhammad Bilal Malik Assistant Director (Law) E.C.P -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Learned counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press the instant petition, it is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed/pending applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Wasim PS
